extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco attacked solo with 17km to go on the final categorized climb after neutralized racing honored Gino Mäder, winning by nearly a minute
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacked at 17km on final climb after GC times frozen at 25km, exploiting ambiguous racing situation
INEOS deployed multiple riders into break after neutralization ended, showing willingness to race despite circumstances
VAN AERT contested stage finish despite no GC implications, signaling form ahead of Tour de France

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: attacked decisively at 17km when racing resumed, soloed to near-minute victory showing exceptional form
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: neutral: briefly followed Evenepoel's attack before being distanced, confirming climbing limitations against elite
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: sprinted for second place on stage with no bonus seconds, indicating sharp form entering Tour prep
rider_signals.POWLESS Neilson: neutral: initiated attacks when neutralization ended but couldn't sustain advantage against Evenepoel
